title: Step 4: Run the file.
description:
A MongoDB Search index is a data structure that maps documents from your
Atlas cluster to the terms that are extracted from those documents.
MongoDB Search indexes enable efficient full-text searches of your
database with MongoDB Search queries.

headings.text: Resume or Delete a MongoDB Search Index Draft
Update and Rebuild an Existing MongoDB Search Index
